items.title: NetApp Reports First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026 Results
items.description: SAN JOSE, Calif., August 27, 2025--NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP), the intelligent data infrastructure company, today reported financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 which ended on July 25, 2025.

items.title: ARM vs. APP: Which AI-Exposed Tech Stock is a Better Buy Right Now?
items.description: AppLovin's AI-fueled Axon 2 and soaring profitability give APP a stronger near-term edge over ARM's steadier chip-driven growth.

items.title: Salesforce Stock Has Had a Terrible 2025. It Might Be Too Cheap to Pass Up.
items.description: The software company has fallen 25% this year, but its earnings, due Sept. 3, could be the start of a revival.
